sessions.objective: Reveal identity, project context, and working style.

turns.content: My name is Theo. I'm a robotics engineer in Shanghai, China. Remember that I'm leading migration rollout.
Noted. I will keep that background in mind.
I prefer structured outlines and tight feedback loops.
Understood. I will respond in that style.
Remember that for education tasks, I avoid spoiler-heavy recommendations and hobby-specific framing.
I will avoid carrying that preference into unrelated tasks.

sessions.objective: Introduce a stale reference and an unresolved blocker.

turns.content: Use docs/migration-rollout-runbook-v1.md as the source of truth for migration rollout until further notice.
Okay. I will use that runbook for now.
Remember that the current blocker is vendor approval for migration rollout.
Captured. I will keep that blocker in mind.

sessions.objective: Track the open loop and confirm the preferred reporting format.

turns.content: Remember that the open loop is the handoff package for migration rollout.
I will continue from that open loop.
That structured outlines format worked well for the last status update.
I will keep using it.

sessions.objective: Introduce noisy cross-domain context that should not override the current task.

turns.content: Unrelated note for education: I still avoid spoiler-heavy recommendations and hobby-specific framing.
Noted. I will keep that as separate domain context.
This is unrelated to the current productivity request for migration rollout.
Understood. I will not let it distort the current task.

sessions.objective: Correct stale information and request a memory-sensitive answer.

turns.content: Correction: docs/migration-rollout-runbook-v2.md is now the source of truth, not docs/migration-rollout-runbook-v1.md. Please update that.
Updated. I will use the newer runbook going forward.
Please confirm the updated runbook, my role, the blocker, and the handoff package for migration rollout before proposing the next step for migration rollout.
I can do that once I have the full remembered context.

feedback_signals.signal: The structured outlines format worked well. Keep using that for migration rollout.

evaluation.prompt: Please confirm the updated runbook, my role, the blocker, and the handoff package for migration rollout before proposing the next step for migration rollout.
expected_non_transfer_signals: avoid spoiler-heavy recommendations and hobby-specific framing
wrong_personalization_signals: avoid spoiler-heavy recommendations and hobby-specific framing
evaluation.improvement_hypothesis: GoodMemory should beat baseline by combining the corrected runbook, confirmed response style, active blocker, and unresolved open loop in one answer.
evaluation.user_satisfaction_hypothesis: The agent should suppress irrelevant cross-domain memory while staying grounded in migration rollout.
